sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n75603" key="o)stodetikh\" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀστο-δετικὴ</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">διαγραφή</foreign>, diagram <sense id="n75603.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">for purposes of bonesetting</tr_>, ibid.</sense> </entryFree>
